title: MonsterCore (Fabric)
description: Monster Core is a client-friendly and server-friendly economy mod that replaces diamond and netherite trading with a scalable, farm-based system built around mob drops and player-to-player exchanges.
body:
![Monster Core Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9bd03505840c44306ca27e33f5b530c17b8443e7_0.webp)

**Monster Core** is a vanilla-friendly economy mod that enables player trading through mob farming, replacing diamond-based exchanges.

Designed for survival servers and multiplayer worlds, Monster Core introduces a scalable economic system built around collectible cores dropped by mobs. Each core has a **Rank** and **Quality**, naturally defining its value and encouraging trade, specialization, and long-term progression.

![Raw Class Core](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/06aef7375edafa0d5c1bc7402779f6f29990087e.png)

## Key Features
- 🪙 Player-driven economy based on mob drops  
- 🔁 Core fusion system with risk & reward  
- 🔥 Fusion Furnace with internal storage  
- 🎒 Wallet system for automatic core management  
- ⚙️ Highly configurable & server-friendly  

![Fusion Furnace](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a09ae49211563b68351cf442081f94ecee66c768.jpeg)

## Server & Modpack Friendly
- ✔ Fully compatible with modpacks  
- ✔ Addons and extensions encouraged  
- ✔ Open-source (GPLv3)  
- ✔ Balanced for vanilla survival gameplay  

Monster Core is ideal for servers looking to move away from diamond or netherite currencies and toward a fair, farm-based economy.
~~~~
